name: Apple-Orange Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, nutmeg, orange juice, and melted butter until well combined.
2. Place the apples in the prepared, unbaked pie shell.
3. Pour the liquid mixture over the apples.
4. Arrange the pastry strips in a lattice pattern on top of the filling.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce the temperature to 250°F (120°C) and continue baking for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the apples are tender.
